body:
Like in https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/pull/4029

one might now have a tuple like `::Tuple{OffsetArrays.OffsetArray{Float64, 3, ReactantCUDAExt.CuTracedArray{Float64, 3, 1, (35, 34, 16)}}, OffsetArrays.OffsetArray{Float64, 3, ReactantCUDAExt.CuTracedArray{Float64, 3, 1, (34, 35, 16)}}})` which is not an `ntuple{<:Any, offsetarray}` (since they aren't the same underlying type) but is a `tuple{vararg{offsetarray}}` (since this is a tuple of all offsetarrays)
title: Generalize ntuple type constraints to be tuple{vararg}
